3043960.name: Stop Them All
3043960.description:
Huge mineral reserves were detected in an old ruined colony on a distant planet. An interplanetary mining company has purchased the rights to mine the planet, however, the colony's defense system kept working after the place was abandoned, infesting the planet with sentinels.
Build your party, defeat waves of enemies, hold your lines.

Key Features:

  • Random Elements: Random waves, different types of soldiers and enemies, and a random upgrade system make every run fun.
  • Fast Runs or Long Runs: Select how many waves you want to fight.
  • Build Your Party: After a wave, you can use the points gained to buy soldiers and upgrades.
  • Progression: Enemies become stronger continuously. Improve your soldiers to hold your lines.
  • Soundtrack: An atmospheric sci-fi soundtrack to improve the experience.
